title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd!
